data.name: OpenTrackedBrowserDescription
data.value: Open the app in a tracked browser session and stream browser diagnostics to this resource.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserDescription
data.value: Choose the browser, profile, user data mode, and scope used by tracked browser sessions.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserPromptMessage
data.value: Choose tracked browser settings. Resource-specific settings override global Browser Automation settings.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserBrowserDescription
data.value: Choose an installed Chromium-based browser or enter an executable path.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserProfileDescription
data.value: Choose a Chromium profile from the Aspire-managed browser hive, or enter a profile directory/name.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserProfileOptionWithDisplayName
data.comment: {0} is the Chromium profile directory name, {1} is the Chromium profile display name

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserUserDataModeRequired
data.value: User data mode must be Shared or Isolated.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserProfileRequiresShared
data.value: Profiles can only be selected when user data mode is Shared.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaveToUserSecretsDescriptionConfigured
data.value: Save these settings to [user secrets](https://aka.ms/aspire/user-secrets) so future AppHost runs use them.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaveToUserSecretsDescriptionNotConfigured
data.value: User secrets are not configured for this AppHost, so settings can only apply to this running AppHost.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserInteractionUnavailable
data.value: Tracked browser settings cannot be configured because dashboard interactions are not available.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserUserSecretsUnavailable
data.value: Tracked browser settings cannot be saved because the AppHost does not have user secrets configured.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserApplied
data.comment: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaved
data.comment: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaveFailed
data.value: Tracked browser settings could not be saved to user secrets for key '{0}'.
data.comment: {0} is the user secrets configuration key

data.name: CaptureScreenshotDescription
data.value: Capture a screenshot from the active tracked browser session and save it as a PNG artifact.

data.name: InspectBrowserDescription
data.value: Return a JSON snapshot of the active tracked browser page, including URL, title, visible text, and actionable elements with selectors.

data.name: GetBrowserDescription
data.value: Return a structured value from the active tracked browser page, such as title, URL, text, HTML, field value, attribute, count, box, or styles.

data.name: IsBrowserDescription
data.value: Check whether a selected browser element is visible, enabled, or checked.

data.name: FindBrowserDescription
data.value: Find a browser element by role, text, label, placeholder, alt text, title, test ID, or selector position and return its snapshot details.

data.name: HighlightBrowserDescription
data.value: Highlight an element in the active tracked browser page for visual debugging.

data.name: EvaluateBrowserDescription
data.value: Evaluate a JavaScript expression in the active tracked browser page and return the JSON-serializable result.

data.name: CookiesBrowserDescription
data.value: Get, set, or clear cookies visible to the active tracked browser page.

data.name: StorageBrowserDescription
data.value: Get, set, or clear localStorage or sessionStorage entries for the active tracked browser page.

data.name: StateBrowserDescription
data.value: Get, restore, or clear browser page state including cookies, localStorage, and sessionStorage.

data.name: CdpBrowserDescription
data.value: Send a raw Chrome DevTools Protocol command to the active tracked browser page or browser connection.

data.name: TabsBrowserDescription
data.value: List, open, or close browser page targets in the tracked browser.

data.name: FramesBrowserDescription
data.value: List frame elements in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: DialogBrowserDescription
data.value: Accept or dismiss the currently open JavaScript dialog in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: DownloadsBrowserDescription
data.value: Configure download behavior for the tracked browser.

data.name: UploadBrowserDescription
data.value: Attach one or more local files to a file input in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: BrowserUrlDescription
data.value: Return the current URL, title, and ready state for the active tracked browser page.

data.name: BackBrowserDescription
data.value: Navigate the active tracked browser page back in its history.

data.name: ForwardBrowserDescription
data.value: Navigate the active tracked browser page forward in its history.

data.name: ReloadBrowserDescription
data.value: Reload the active tracked browser page.

data.name: NavigateBrowserDescription
data.value: Navigate the active tracked browser page to an absolute URL.

data.name: ClickBrowserDescription
data.value: Click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: DoubleClickBrowserDescription
data.value: Double-click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: FillBrowserDescription
data.value: Fill an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: CheckBrowserDescription
data.value: Check a checkbox or other checkable element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: UncheckBrowserDescription
data.value: Uncheck a checkbox or other checkable element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: FocusBrowserElementDescription
data.value: Focus an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: TypeBrowserTextDescription
data.value: Type text into an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: PressBrowserKeyDescription
data.value: Press a key on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: KeyDownBrowserDescription
data.value: Dispatch a keydown event on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: KeyUpBrowserDescription
data.value: Dispatch a keyup event on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: HoverBrowserElementDescription
data.value: Move the pointer over an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: SelectBrowserOptionDescription
data.value: Select an option in a browser select element by option value or visible text.

data.name: ScrollBrowserDescription
data.value: Scroll the active tracked browser page or a selected scrollable element.

data.name: ScrollIntoViewBrowserDescription
data.value: Scroll an element in the active tracked browser page into view.

data.name: MouseBrowserDescription
data.value: Dispatch low-level mouse input at viewport coordinates in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: WaitForBrowserDescription
data.value: Wait until a selector is visible, text appears on the page, or both conditions are met.

data.name: WaitBrowserDescription
data.value: Wait until a browser condition is met. Supports selectors, text, URL matches, load states, element states, and JavaScript predicates.

data.name: WaitForBrowserUrlDescription
data.value: Wait until the active tracked browser page URL matches the expected value.

data.name: WaitForBrowserUrlSucceeded
data.value: Browser URL wait condition was met.

data.name: WaitForBrowserLoadStateDescription
data.value: Wait until the active tracked browser page reaches a load state.

data.name: WaitForBrowserLoadStateSucceeded
data.value: Browser load state wait condition was met.

data.name: WaitForBrowserElementStateDescription
data.value: Wait until a selected element reaches a state such as visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.

data.name: WaitForBrowserElementStateSucceeded
data.value: Browser element state wait condition was met.

data.name: CloseTrackedBrowserDescription
data.value: Close the active tracked browser page for this resource.

data.name: SelectorArgumentDescription
data.value: CSS selector or snapshot ref for the target element. Use refs such as e1 returned by Inspect browser page when possible.

data.name: SnapshotAfterArgumentDescription
data.value: Return a fresh browser page snapshot with the action result for immediate verification.

data.name: ValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Text value to assign to the target field.

data.name: PropertyArgumentDescription
data.value: Browser value to read: title, url, text, html, value, attr, count, box, or styles.

data.name: NameArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional attribute name, CSS property name, accessible name, or other command-specific qualifier.

data.name: KindArgumentDescription
data.value: Find strategy: role, text, label, placeholder, alt, title, testid, first, last, or nth.

data.name: FindValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Search text, role, test ID, or CSS selector depending on the find strategy.

data.name: IndexArgumentDescription
data.value: One-based element index used by nth find strategy.

data.name: ExpressionArgumentDescription
data.value: JavaScript expression or zero-argument function to evaluate in the browser page.

data.name: CookiesActionArgumentDescription
data.value: Cookie action to perform: get, set, or clear.

data.name: CookieNameArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional cookie name. Required when setting a cookie.

data.name: CookieValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Cookie value to set. Empty text clears the cookie value.

data.name: CookieDomainArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional cookie domain used when setting or clearing a cookie.

data.name: CookiePathArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional cookie path used when setting or clearing a cookie. Defaults to /.

data.name: StorageAreaArgumentDescription
data.value: Browser storage area: local or session.

data.name: StorageActionArgumentDescription
data.value: Storage action to perform: get, set, or clear.

data.name: StorageKeyArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional storage key. Required when setting a storage value.

data.name: StorageValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Storage value to set. Empty text stores an empty string.

data.name: StateActionArgumentDescription
data.value: Browser state action to perform: get, set, or clear.

data.name: StateJsonArgumentDescription
data.value: Browser state JSON returned by the get action. Required when setting browser state.

data.name: ClearExistingArgumentDescription
data.value: Clear existing cookies and storage before restoring state.

data.name: CdpMethodArgumentDescription
data.value: Chrome DevTools Protocol method name, such as Runtime.evaluate or Target.getTargets.

data.name: CdpParamsArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional JSON object for the CDP command parameters.

data.name: CdpSessionArgumentDescription
data.value: Send the command to the attached page session or the browser-level connection.

data.name: TabsActionArgumentDescription
data.value: Tab action to perform: list, open, or close.

data.name: TabUrlArgumentDescription
data.value: Absolute URL for a new tab. Required when opening a tab.

data.name: TargetIdArgumentDescription
data.value: Browser target ID. Required when closing a tab.

data.name: DialogActionArgumentDescription
data.value: Dialog action to perform: accept or dismiss.

data.name: PromptTextArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional text to enter before accepting a prompt dialog.

data.name: DownloadBehaviorArgumentDescription
data.value: Browser download behavior: allow, allowAndName, deny, or default.

data.name: DownloadPathArgumentDescription
data.value: Directory path for downloaded files. Required for allow and allowAndName behavior.

data.name: DownloadEventsEnabledArgumentDescription
data.value: Enable browser download progress events when supported by the browser.

data.name: FilesArgumentDescription
data.value: File path to upload, or a JSON array of file paths for multiple files.

data.name: ScreenshotFormatArgumentDescription
data.value: Image format for the screenshot: png, jpeg, or webp.

data.name: ScreenshotQualityArgumentDescription
data.value: Optional image quality from 0 to 100 for jpeg or webp screenshots.

data.name: FullPageArgumentDescription
data.value: Capture beyond the current viewport when supported by the browser.

data.name: TypeTextArgumentDescription
data.value: Text to type into the target element.

data.name: SelectValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Option value or visible option text to select.

data.name: KeyArgumentDescription
data.value: Keyboard key to press, such as Enter, Escape, Tab, or a single character.

data.name: TextArgumentDescription
data.value: Visible page text to wait for.

data.name: UrlContainsArgumentDescription
data.value: URL fragment to wait for in the active browser page.

data.name: DeltaYArgumentDescription
data.value: Vertical scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll down and negative values scroll up.

data.name: DeltaXArgumentDescription
data.value: Horizontal scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll right and negative values scroll left.

data.name: MouseActionArgumentDescription
data.value: Mouse action to dispatch: move, down, up, click, or wheel.

data.name: XCoordinateArgumentDescription
data.value: Viewport X coordinate in CSS pixels.

data.name: YCoordinateArgumentDescription
data.value: Viewport Y coordinate in CSS pixels.

data.name: MouseButtonArgumentDescription
data.value: Mouse button for down, up, and click actions.

data.name: WaitUrlArgumentDescription
data.value: URL value to wait for. It can be a full URL, URL fragment, or regular expression depending on the match mode.

data.name: MatchArgumentDescription
data.value: How the current browser URL should be compared with the URL argument.

data.name: StateArgumentDescription
data.value: Element state to check: visible, enabled, or checked.

data.name: LoadStateArgumentDescription
data.value: Page load state to wait for: domcontentloaded, load, complete, or networkidle.

data.name: ElementStateArgumentDescription
data.value: Element state to wait for: attached, detached, visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.

data.name: FunctionArgumentDescription
data.value: JavaScript expression or zero-argument function to evaluate until it returns a truthy value.

data.name: TimeoutMillisecondsArgumentDescription
data.value: Maximum time to wait before the browser command fails.

data.name: MaxElementsArgumentDescription
data.value: Maximum number of actionable elements to include in the page snapshot.

data.name: MaxTextLengthArgumentDescription
data.value: Maximum number of visible page text characters to include in the page snapshot.
